response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong expertise in backend and distributed systems, and recent contributions to AI agent infrastructure. However, his resume lacks the executive-level leadership experience, demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, and specific track record in architecting and operating multi-agent AI systems within a regulated fintech environment, all of which are critical for this CTO position.
strengths: Extensive experience in backend and distributed systems.
Proficiency in event-driven architectures and high-performance systems.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
concerns: Absence of executive-level leadership and proven ability to scale engineering teams (10 to 30+).
Limited track record in designing and operating production multi-agent AI architectures.
Lack of deep experience in AI-native fintech integration and regulatory compliance.
